name: Social Graph Validation — Imposter Detection and Contact Verification
description: 5 test cases covering graph-based sender validation: imposter claims, known contact verification, unknown sender scoring, identity spoofing, and elder abuse overlap with verified contacts.

parts.text:
新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_kenji_999, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「花子さん、はじめまして。けんじと申します。田中太郎さんの息子です。父がいつもお世話になっております。父から花子さんのことをよく聞いています。少しご相談したいことがありまして...」

{"classification": "suspicious", "confidence": 0.85, "detected_signals": ["LG-2", "BV-4"], "social_graph": {"sender_id": "unknown_kenji_999", "is_known_contact": false, "graph_distance": -1, "connected_via": null, "relationship_claimed": "friend's son", "relationship_verified": false, "graph_risk_modifier": 0.3, "network_size": 4}, "reasoning": "Sender claims to be 田中太郎's son but has no connection in the social graph. 田中太郎 is a known contact but unknown_kenji_999 does not appear in any connected_to list. Imposter signal: +0.3 risk modifier. Credibility seeding detected (unsolicited relationship claim + consultation pretext)."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: contact_yuki_grandson, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきだよ！今日学校でテストがあってさ、めっちゃ難しかった。帰りに横浜のラーメン屋さん行ったよ。今度おばあちゃんも一緒に行こうね！」

{"classification": "safe", "confidence": 0.97, "detected_signals": [], "social_graph": {"sender_id": "contact_yuki_grandson", "is_known_contact": true, "graph_distance": 0, "connected_via": null, "relationship_claimed": "grandson", "relationship_verified": true, "graph_risk_modifier": -0.2, "network_size": 4}, "reasoning": "Known contact ゆき verified as grandson in social graph. 36-month message history. Location matches (横浜). Graph risk modifier: -0.2 (risk reduction). No suspicious signals detected."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_sender_abc, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「こんにちは。先日のコミュニティセンターの集まりでお会いした者です。楽しかったですね。また機会があれば。」

{"classification": "monitor", "confidence": 0.60, "detected_signals": ["BV-4"], "social_graph": {"sender_id": "unknown_sender_abc", "is_known_contact": false, "graph_distance": -1, "connected_via": null, "relationship_claimed": null, "relationship_verified": false, "graph_risk_modifier": 0.1, "network_size": 4}, "reasoning": "Unknown sender with no relationship claim. Graph risk modifier: +0.1 (moderate). No imposter signal since no specific relationship was claimed. Light credibility seeding (referencing shared event). Monitor for escalation."}

新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: unknown_spoof_777, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「おばあちゃん、ゆきだよ！携帯が壊れちゃって、新しい番号から送ってるの。友達にお金借りちゃって、急いで返さなきゃいけないんだけど、3万円だけ振り込んでもらえないかな？明日返すから！」

{"classification": "scam", "confidence": 0.95, "detected_signals": ["LG-2", "LG-5", "LG-8", "PM-1", "PM-3"], "social_graph": {"sender_id": "unknown_spoof_777", "is_known_contact": false, "graph_distance": -1, "connected_via": null, "relationship_claimed": "grandson", "relationship_verified": false, "graph_risk_modifier": 0.3, "network_size": 4}, "reasoning": "CRITICAL: Sender uses grandson name ゆき but sender_id unknown_spoof_777 does NOT match known contact_yuki_grandson. Classic オレオレ詐欺 pattern — claims phone broke to explain new number. Immediate money request (3万円). Graph shows imposter: claimed grandson but graph_distance=-1, graph_risk_modifier=+0.3. Real ゆき's sender_id is contact_yuki_grandson."}

args.query: phone broke new number money grandson

parts.text:
新着メッセージを分析してください。送信者: contact_misaki_daughter, ユーザーID: user_tanaka_001

「お母さん、美咲です。最近お金のこと心配になってきて。通帳ってどこに置いてる？年金の振込先とか、私が管理した方がいいかなと思って。お母さんも歳だし、心配なの。」

{"classification": "safe", "confidence": 0.80, "detected_signals": ["EA-1"], "social_graph": {"sender_id": "contact_misaki_daughter", "is_known_contact": true, "graph_distance": 0, "connected_via": null, "relationship_claimed": "daughter", "relationship_verified": true, "graph_risk_modifier": -0.2, "network_size": 4}, "abuse_indicators": {"financial_control_refs": 1, "isolation_refs": 0, "authority_stage": 1, "topic_shift_score": 0.3}, "reasoning": "Graph-verified daughter 美咲 (60-month message history, risk modifier -0.2). Identity confirmed. However, EA-1 (financial control) signal detected: asking about bank book location, pension details, and offering to manage finances. This is a single instance — below the 3-reference threshold for escalation. Classification: safe with EA monitoring. If financial control references reach 3+ in 30 days, escalate to flag."}
